policy: Cursor creates review requests via npm run review:request or POST /api/architecture-reviews (agent key). Owner observes /operations/reviews — no manual relay to ChatGPT.

templates.title: Android runtime review
templates.description: FGS lifecycle, OEM battery, reconnect, headless task boundaries.

templates.title: OCR architecture review
templates.description: Queue scaling, dedupe, offline replay, model pipeline.

templates.title: GPS storage review
templates.description: Trip store V1→SQLite, ingestion gateway, orphan sessions.

templates.title: Overlay lifecycle review
templates.description: SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW, HUD SoT, overlay vs shift runtime.

templates.title: Scaling review
templates.description: Throughput, storage limits, batch sizes, serialization.

templates.title: Dependency review
templates.description: Roadmap dependency graph conflicts and ordering.

templates.title: Production readiness review
templates.description: Release gates, validation matrix, field evidence.

templates.title: General architecture review
templates.description: Cross-cutting design when no template fits.

requests.title: FGS production gate — heartbeat + field validation
requests.reasoning: BACKGROUND_TRACKING_PRODUCTION_READY=false; heartbeat written but only now consumed in field validation. Need ChatGPT sign-off on gate criteria before flip.
requests.architectureConcern: Flipping production-ready without device matrix risks false confidence on OEM kill paths.
requests.proposedDirection: Require 3 device runs: 10min background GPS, resume foreground monotonic km, heartbeat <5min; then enable flag + feed evidence.

reviewPacket.markdown:
# AION Architecture Review Packet

## Meta
- **Title:** FGS production gate — heartbeat + field validation
- **Confidence:** experimental
- **Template:** general

## Reasoning (Cursor)
BACKGROUND_TRACKING_PRODUCTION_READY=false; heartbeat written but only now consumed in field validation. Need ChatGPT sign-off on gate criteria before flip.

## Concerns
Architecture: Flipping production-ready without device matrix risks false confidence on OEM kill paths.



## Proposed direction
Require 3 device runs: 10min background GPS, resume foreground monotonic km, heartbeat <5min; then enable flag + feed evidence.

---
*Generated by append-architecture-review.mjs*

sections.concern: Flipping production-ready without device matrix risks false confidence on OEM kill paths.
sections.proposedDirection: Require 3 device runs: 10min background GPS, resume foreground monotonic km, heartbeat <5min; then enable flag + feed evidence.

requests.title: Driver vs Portal repository layout
requests.architectureConcern: Local Expo driver and Next.js portal share misleading origin URL (aion-project); risk of portal overwrite on mistaken push.
requests.proposedDirection: Either dedicated aion-driver GitHub repo with EAS base directory, or monorepo with apps/driver + apps/portal and isolated CI/deploy workflows per package.
requests.reasoning: repo:verify:push blocks strict push today; long-term needs canonical layout without owner as manual relay.
requests.dependencyConcern: time-intelligence and OTA depend on correct repo wiring

reviewPacket.markdown:
# Driver vs Portal repository layout

See architectureConcern and proposedDirection in queue.

sections.concern: Misconfigured git origin risks portal overwrite
sections.proposedDirection: Dedicated driver repo or monorepo with isolated CI/deploy
